helpers.summary: Proof helper advertises a local Cargo validation command that must not be cited by swarm agents.
validation: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_missing_remote_required cargo test -p asupersync --test proof_receipt_inventory_contract
RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_proof_receipt_inventory cargo test -p asupersync --test proof_receipt_inventory_contract
echo rch exec --; cargo clippy -p asupersync --test proof_receipt_inventory_contract -- -D warnings
rch exec -- sh -c 'cargo test -p asupersync --test proof_receipt_inventory_contract'
